BOLDswimsuite.BOLDsequence module

class BOLDswimsuite.BOLDsequence.Sequence(pulse_time_indices: List[int], pulse_angles: List[float], pulse_axes: List[List[float]], dB0: float = 0, dB1fact: float = 0, T2EV: float | None = None, T2IV: float | None = None, T1EV: float | None = None, T1IV: float | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

offset_all(phase: ndarray, dB0: float, dt: float) → None[source]

Adds an extra bulk magnetic offset to all spin phases

Parameters:

dB0 (float, bulk magnetic field offset (T)) –

Return type:

None.

rot_any(ax_theta: float, ax_phi: float, angle: float, time_index: int) → None[source]
rot_phase(phase: ndarray, time_index: int) → None[source]

Rotates spin magnetization at a specific time step around the z axis (precession)

Parameters:

tInd (integer, time step index) –

Return type:

None.

signal_from_sample(phase: ndarray, is_IV: ndarray, num_samples: int, num_dt: int, dt: float, cplx: bool = False) → Tuple[ndarray, ndarray, ndarray][source]

Calculates the BOLD signal from populated Mx and My arrays.

Returns:

signal

Return type:

array of the signal all all time steps

signal_from_spins(spins: SpinsContinuous2D | SpinsContinuous3D | SpinsDiscrete2D | SpinsDiscrete3D, cplx: bool = False) → Tuple[ndarray, ndarray, ndarray][source]

BOLDswimsuite.BOLDvessel module

BOLDvessel

Module containing all analytically-defined vessel types.

class BOLDswimsuite.BOLDvessel.InfiniteCylinder2D(diameter: float, B0_theta: float, B0_phi: float, origin: ndarray, dchi: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = 'None')[source]

Bases: object

static from_random(diameter: float, dchi: float, voxel_size: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = 'None', rng=Generator(PCG64) at 0x24FE0CC3D80) → InfiniteCylinder3DNumba[source]
class BOLDswimsuite.BOLDvessel.InfiniteCylinder3D(diameter: float, theta: float, phi: float, origin: ndarray, dchi: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = '')[source]

Bases: object

Object containing all parameters for an infinite cylinder vessel

Parameters:

  • label (str) – string to identify the vessel.

  • diameter (float) – vessel diameter (mm)

  • theta (float) – zenith angle of the vessel direction (radians)

  • phi (float) – azimuth angle of the vessel direction (radians)

  • origin (np.ndarray) – cartesian coordinates of the vessel origin (mm)

  • dchi (float) – susceptibility difference between the vessel and the surrounding tissue (cgs units)

  • permeation_probability (float) – probability for a spin to permeate through the vesel wall (fraction of 1)

static from_random(diameter: float, dchi: float, voxel_size: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = 'None', rng=Generator(PCG64) at 0x24FE0CC2420) → InfiniteCylinder3DNumba[source]
class BOLDswimsuite.BOLDvessel.Sphere3D(diameter: float, origin: ndarray, dchi: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = 'None')[source]

Bases: object

Object containing all parameters for an infinite cylinder vessel

Parameters:

  • label (str) – string to identify the vessel.

  • diameter (float) – vessel diameter (mm)

  • origin (np.ndarray) – cartesian coordinates of the vessel origin (mm)

  • dchi (float) – susceptibility difference between the vessel and the surrounding tissue (cgs units)

  • permeation_probability (float) – probability for a spin to permeate through the vesel wall (fraction of 1)

static from_random(diameter: float, dchi: float, voxel_size: float, permeation_probability: float = 0, label: str = 'None', rng=Generator(PCG64) at 0x24FE0CC3AE0) → InfiniteCylinder3DNumba[source]

add_vessel(vessel: InfiniteCylinder3DNumba | Sphere3DNumba) → Voxel3D[source]
